## Source: ghsa-malware (e258eb1a56ecfdc322d78bae5c7641e4ff7400fc9845d37252a2267e1bf7bff3)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c51eb8de5b4c76701af20deeb703ba85374c2036c17fd5bcd09b7b0233c6ae34)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'haefgerasgrae' @ 0.1.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

---

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
